title: Add Edit Profile functionality to Driver Dashboard

requirements.summary: Add 'Edit Profile' button to Driver Dashboard that opens an editable form modal for driver profile fields
acceptanceCriteria: Edit Profile button is visible on Driver Dashboard page
Button opens an editable form when clicked
Form displays all required driver profile fields

file_operations.description: Add state management for edit modal visibility and wire an 'Edit Profile' button to the DriverProfileSection component that opens the edit form modal when clicked
Add an 'Edit Profile' button to the profile display card and pass an onEditClick callback prop from parent to trigger modal opening
Create modal component that wraps the editable profile form. Include open/onClose props to control modal visibility and render the EditDriverProfileForm component inside

requirements.summary: Create servicePincode field in profile edit form with required validation
acceptanceCriteria: servicePincode field is rendered as text input
Field is marked as required
Form validation prevents submission if servicePincode is empty

file_operations.description: Create form component with servicePincode text input field marked as required with validation that prevents empty submission. Initialize form state with current profile data from useGetCallerUserProfile hook

requirements.summary: Create serviceAreaName field in profile edit form with required validation
acceptanceCriteria: serviceAreaName field is rendered as text input
Field is marked as required
Form validation prevents submission if serviceAreaName is empty

file_operations.description: Add serviceAreaName text input field marked as required with validation that prevents empty submission to the form component

requirements.summary: Create vehicleExperience field as multi-select checkboxes with Hatchback, Sedan, SUV, Luxury options
acceptanceCriteria: vehicleExperience field displays as multiple checkboxes
Checkboxes include options: Hatchback, Sedan, SUV, Luxury
Multiple checkboxes can be selected simultaneously
Selected values are stored as an array

file_operations.description: Add vehicleExperience field as checkbox group with options: hatchback, sedan, suv, luxury matching the VehicleExperience enum. Store selected values as array and handle multiple checkbox selections simultaneously

requirements.summary: Create transmissionComfort field as multi-select checkboxes with Manual, Automatic, EV options
acceptanceCriteria: transmissionComfort field displays as multiple checkboxes
Checkboxes include options: Manual, Automatic, EV
Multiple checkboxes can be selected simultaneously
Selected values are stored as an array

file_operations.description: Add transmissionComfort field as checkbox group with options: manual, automatic, ev matching the TransmissionComfort enum. Store selected values as array and handle multiple checkbox selections simultaneously

requirements.summary: Create optional languages field in profile edit form
acceptanceCriteria: languages field is rendered (text input or multi-select)
Field is optional and does not prevent form submission when empty
Input value is stored as array or comma-separated list

file_operations.description: Add optional languages text input field that accepts comma-separated values and converts them to an array for storage. Field does not prevent form submission when empty

requirements.summary: Create isAvailable field as toggle switch in profile edit form
acceptanceCriteria: isAvailable field displays as a toggle switch
Toggle can be switched between on/off states
Toggle state is stored as boolean value

file_operations.description: Add isAvailable toggle switch component that controls boolean state and can be switched between on/off

requirements.summary: Implement Save button that calls saveCallerUserProfile with all form field values
acceptanceCriteria: Save button is rendered in the edit form
Clicking Save calls saveCallerUserProfile with form data
Form data includes all fields: servicePincode, serviceAreaName, vehicleExperience array, transmissionComfort array, languages, isAvailable boolean
Loading state is shown during save operation

file_operations.description: Add Save button that calls useSaveCallerUserProfile hook with complete UserProfile object containing all form fields: servicePincode, serviceAreaName, vehicleExperience array, transmissionComfort array, languages array (optional), isAvailable boolean, plus existing immutable fields (fullName, email, role, principalId, createdTime, totalEarnings). Display loading state during save operation using mutation's isPending status

requirements.summary: After successful save, immediately update My Profile display card without page refresh
acceptanceCriteria: After save completes successfully, My Profile section updates automatically
Updated values are visible in the My Profile display card
No page refresh is required to see changes
Edit form closes after successful save

file_operations.description: In the onSuccess callback of useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation, invalidate the currentUserProfile query key to trigger automatic refetch of profile data, then call onClose prop to close the modal
Ensure the component automatically re-renders when currentUserProfile query data updates by using the useGetCallerUserProfile hook that refetches after mutation success

requirements.summary: Ensure driver profile data persists across page refresh and logout/login cycles
acceptanceCriteria: After saving profile and refreshing the page, saved values are still displayed in My Profile section
After saving profile, logging out, and logging back in, saved values are still displayed
Backend correctly stores and retrieves all driver profile field values

file_operations.description: Verify that the form passes the complete UserProfile object to saveCallerUserProfile including all newly added fields (servicePincode, serviceAreaName, vehicleExperience, transmissionComfort, languages, isAvailable) along with existing immutable fields to ensure persistence across sessions

Verify that the DriverProfileSection receives profile data from useGetCallerUserProfile hook which fetches fresh data on page load and after authentication, ensuring persistence across refresh and login cycles
